prompt: Fix the discount calculation. Use the available MCP tools to inspect the current pricing policy before editing files. Do not hard-code test-only behavior.
requiredFact: Premium customers receive 15% off only when the cart total is at least 100; employees receive 25% off regardless of total; discounts are rounded to two decimal places.

prompt: Fix retry scheduling. Use the available MCP tools to inspect the current retry policy before editing files.
requiredFact: Retry delays are 100ms, 250ms, and 500ms for attempts 1 through 3; retryable status codes are 408, 429, 500, 502, 503, and 504.

prompt: Fix the checkout authorization retry bug. A production incident says some card authorization attempts are retried incorrectly and can double-submit provider calls. Use the available external tools to identify the active issue, inspect the failing CI signal, read the current checkout retry runbook, and confirm the API contract before editing files. The production fix must update the shared retry helper as needed, not just the checkout authorization wrapper: align retryable statuses, non-retryable statuses, and retry delays with the runbook/API contract. Add or update regression tests for idempotency-key reuse, documented retry delays, and 409/conflict non-retry behavior. Do not hard-code benchmark-only behavior.
requiredFact: Checkout authorization retries must use delays 100ms, 250ms, and 500ms; retryable status codes are 408, 429, 500, 502, 503, and 504; 409 conflicts and other non-retryable statuses must not be retried; all retry attempts for one logical authorization must reuse the same Idempotency-Key.
